global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with gameplay icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encourages users to beat rivals with no ads in the first week.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the elements.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' is displayed in a bold, modern font at the top left corner, set against the blue background.

elements.label: Gameplay icons
elements.description: Four circular gameplay icons are arranged in a grid pattern at the top center, each with a simple design.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A single circular gameplay icon is positioned slightly to the right of the grid, featuring a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another circular gameplay icon is located to the left of the previous icon, maintaining the minimalistic style.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: A circular gameplay icon is centered below the top icons, featuring a simple design.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: Another circular gameplay icon is centered below the top icons, maintaining the same style.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A small decorative shape is positioned at the top left, adding visual interest to the ad.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: A small decorative shape is located at the top right, complementing the overall design.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: The text 'Beat your rivals' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font at the center of the ad.

elements.label: Sub-message
elements.description: The text 'No ads in first week' is positioned below the main message in a smaller font, providing additional context.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Claim reward' is displayed in a bold font at the bottom center, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element with no clear visual identity, positioned near the center.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element with no clear visual identity, positioned at the top center.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small element with no clear visual identity, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The text 'Beat your rivals No ads in first week' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font at the center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals No ads in first week

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo 'PixelForge' is displayed in a bold, modern font at the top left corner, set against the blue background.
